## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** Media Player With Caption Support **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Auditory Access, Screen Reader Semantic **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification & Reflow, Environmental Contrast, Vestibular & Motion, Keyboard & Motor, Cognitive & Neurodivergent --- ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 0 | | MAJOR | 1 | | MINOR | 2 | | ENHANCEMENT | 0 | --- ### Perspectives That Passed - None (findings present in both perspectives) --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role **Front-End Dev** - **Captions track missing explicit association with video element** — Auditory Access — MINOR — 1.2.2 - **Time display aria-live set to "off" unnecessarily** — Screen Reader Semantic — MINOR — 2.4.7 **Content Author** - **Transcript not programmatically linked to video element** — Auditory Access — MINOR — 1.2.1 - **Caption accuracy requires human verification** — Auditory Access — MINOR — 1.2.2 --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification - Caption accuracy and timing for `/video/tutorial-en.vtt` - Transcript completeness and synchronization with video content --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping) --- ## Detailed Findings ``` **Finding:** Captions track missing explicit association with video element **WCAG:** 1.2.2 Captions (Prerecorded) **Perspective:** Auditory Access **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author) **Evidence:** `` lacks `aria-describedby` or `aria-labelledby` linking to video **Fix:** Add `aria-describedby="caption-track"` to video element and `
English captions
` in DOM ``` ``` **Finding:** Time display aria-live set to "off" unnecessarily **WCAG:** 2.4.7 Focus Visible **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** `aria-live="off"` on `.time-display` when dynamic content updates don't require live region **Fix:** Remove `aria-live` attribute or set to "polite" for progressive disclosure ``` ``` **Finding:** Transcript not programmatically linked to video element **WCAG:** 1.2.1 Audio Only and Video Only (Prerecorded) **Perspective:** Auditory Access **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `
` transcript exists but no `aria-describedby` or `aria-labelledby` connecting it to video **Fix:** Add `aria-describedby="transcript-link"` to video element and `
Full transcript available below
` ``` ``` **Finding:** Caption accuracy requires human verification **WCAG:** 1.2.2 Captions (Prerecorded) **Perspective:** Auditory Access **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `src="/video/tutorial-en.vtt"` captions file present but content quality unverified **Fix:** Human review of caption accuracy, timing, and speaker identification **[Human verification required — cannot be confirmed from source]** ``` --- ## Technical Validation **Passing Features:** - ✅ Captions track with `default` attribute (1.2.2) - ✅ Audio descriptions track present (1.2.5) - ✅ Keyboard-operable controls (2.1.1) - ✅ No autoplay (1.4.2) - ✅ `role="toolbar"` on controls group (4.1.2) - ✅ `aria-pressed` state on captions toggle (4.1.3) - ✅ Focus-visible styles on all interactive elements (2.4.7) **Implementation Gaps:** - ⚠️ Missing explicit association between video and transcript/captions - ⚠️ Unnecessary `aria-live="off"` on time display - ⚠️ Caption accuracy requires content verification --- ## ARRM Role Recommendations **Front-End Dev:** - Add explicit associations between video and its transcript/captions using `aria-describedby` - Remove unnecessary `aria-live="off"` from time display **Content Author:** - Verify caption accuracy, timing, and speaker identification in `/video/tutorial-en.vtt` - Ensure transcript in `
` section is complete and synchronized with video content **UX Design:** - Consider adding visual indicator for captions state (on/off) in player UI --- ## Code-Level Citations - Captions track: `video.jsx:25` - Transcript section: `video.jsx:57` - Time display: `video.jsx:48` - Focus styles: `video.css:25-29` - Video element attributes: `video.jsx:12-17`
